# Hope Hospital

> Hope Hospital is a NABH-accredited multispecialty super-specialty hospital in Nagpur, Maharashtra, India, established in 2004 and led by orthopedic surgeon Dr. B.K. Murali. It provides surgical, diagnostic and 24/7 emergency care across orthopedics, cardiology, neurosurgery, oncology, nephrology, gastroenterology, maternity and critical care.

Hope Hospital is empaneled under Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY) and 20+ government health schemes, so eligible patients can receive many major surgeries free of cost.

- Address: Near Go-Gas Auto LPG-2, Teka Naka, Kamptee Road, Nagpur – 440026, Maharashtra, India
- Phone: 071-22980073 / +91-9823555053 (24/7 emergency)
- Website: https://www.hopehospital.com

## Main pages
- [Home](https://www.hopehospital.com/): Overview of Hope Hospital, Nagpur — specialties, highlights and patient information.
- [About Hope Hospital](https://www.hopehospital.com/about): History since 2004, NABH accreditation, leadership and facilities.
- [Departments](https://www.hopehospital.com/departments): All medical departments and specialties offered.
- [Hospital Locations](https://www.hopehospital.com/hospitals): Hospital location and address details.
- [Government Empanelments](https://www.hopehospital.com/empanelments): Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY and government health-scheme coverage.
- [Contact](https://www.hopehospital.com/contact): Phone numbers, address, directions and appointment booking.
- [Dr. B.K. Murali](https://www.hopehospital.com/doctors/dr-bk-murali): Profile of the founder and lead orthopedic surgeon.
